sections.paragraph:
- Original: προέπω

- Transliteration: Proepo

- Phonetic: pro-ep'-o

- Definition:

1. to say before

a. to say in what precedes, to say above

b. to say before i.e. heretofore, formerly

c. to say beforehand i.e. before the event: prophecies

- Origin: from G4253 and G2036

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4253 and G2036; to say already to predict: - forewarn say (speak tell) before. Compare G4280.
